message:
fix(reconstruct): emit summary when cross-project collisions exceed sample limit

Fresh-eye review of 8884abeb spotted that record_cross_project_canonical_collision
itemized only the first DUPLICATE_CANONICAL_WARNING_SAMPLE_LIMIT (5) collisions
into stats.warnings and went silent past that. The duplicate path has the
parallel finalize_duplicate_warnings to emit a single summary line above the
limit; the new cross-project path was missing the equivalent. Adds
finalize_cross_project_canonical_collision_warnings, called alongside the
existing finalize from reconstruct_from_archive, plus a unit test covering
both at-limit (no summary) and above-limit (one summary mentioning the total
count and "cross-project") behavior.

Also tidies the cross-project regression test's filenames to be space-free
(alice-a / alice-b) per the convention used by the existing canonical-id
duplicate test, leaving the message subject body unchanged.
